features.name: enum with unbounded queue-style dimension
features.description: Code should include an enum declaration using unbounded queue index '$' as dimension specifier, which is invalid syntax that triggers a crash

features.name: enum with lsb greater than msb base type
features.description: Code should include an enum declaration where the base type has lsb greater than msb, which should be allowed but triggers an assert
features.snippet: enum logic [0:3] E { A = 4, B = 3, C = 2, D = 1 };
